data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_IsntItNiceInHere: MOM: See, {PLAYER}?\nIsn't it nice in here, too?
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_MoversPokemonGoSetC:
The mover's POKéMON do all the work
of moving us in and cleaning up after.\lThis is so convenient!\p{PLAYER}, your room is upstairs.
Go check it out, dear!\pDAD bought you a new clock to mark
our move here.\lDon't forget to set it!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_ArentYouInterestedI: MOM: Well, {PLAYER}?\pAren't you interested in seeing your\nvery own room?
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_GoSetTheClock: MOM: {PLAYER}.\pGo set the clock in your room, honey.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_MaybeDadWillBeOn: MOM: Look! It's PETALBURG GYM!\nMaybe DAD will be on!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_ItsOverWeMissedHim: MOM: Oh... It's over.\pI think DAD was on, but we missed him.\nToo bad.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_GoIntroduceYourself: Oh, yes.\nOne of DAD's friends lives in town.\pPROF. BIRCH is his name.\pHe lives right next door, so you should\ngo over and introduce yourself.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_DidYouMeetProfBirch: MOM: Did you introduce yourself to\nPROF. BIRCH?
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_YouShouldRestABit: MOM: How are you doing, {PLAYER}?\nYou look a little tired.\pI think you should rest a bit.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_GotDadsBadgeHeresSo: MOM: Oh? Did DAD give you that BADGE?\pThen here's something from your MOM!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_DontPushYourselfToo: Don't push yourself too hard, dear.\nYou can always come home.\pGo for it, honey!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_ReportFromPetalburg: INTERVIEWER: ...We brought you this\nreport from in front of PETALBURG GYM.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_TheresAMovieOnTV: There is a movie on TV.\pTwo men are dancing on a big piano\nkeyboard.\pBetter get going!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.UnknownString_81728E3:
It's the instruction booklet for the
RUNNING SHOES.\p“Press the B Button to run while
wearing your RUNNING SHOES.\p“Lace up your RUNNING SHOES and hit
the road running!”
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_TicketFromBrineyCam:
DAD: Hm?\pHey, it's {PLAYER}!\pIt's been a while since I saw you,
but you look...stronger, somehow.\pThat's the impression I get.
But your old man hasn't given up yet!\pOh, yes, I have something for you.
This came to you from someone named\lMR. BRINEY.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_PortsInSlateportLil:
DAD: Hm, a TICKET for a ferry?\pIf I recall, there are ferry ports in
SLATEPORT and LILYCOVE.\p{PLAYER}, if you have ambition as a
TRAINER, go to the BATTLE TOWER.\pIt should teach you that there is
no end to a TRAINER's chosen path.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_BetterGetBackToGym: I'd better get back to PETALBURG GYM.\pMOM, thanks for looking after the house\nwhile I'm away.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_DadShouldStayLonger: MOM: That DAD of yours...\pHe comes home for the first time in a\nwhile, but all he talks about is POKéMON.\pHe should relax and stay a little longer.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.UnknownString_8172C50:
We bring you a special news bulletin.\pWe've received reports of a blue FLYING
POKéMON in various HOENN locales.\pThe identity of this POKéMON has not
yet been determined.\pWe now return you to your regular
movie presentation.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.UnknownString_8172D30:
We bring you a special news bulletin.\pWe've received reports of a red FLYING
POKéMON in various HOENN locales.\pThe identity of this POKéMON has not
yet been determined.\pWe now return you to your regular
movie presentation.
